title: Universal Angle Grinder Spanner 8-48mm Adjustable Pin Spanner with Allen Key Fitting Part Flange Home Spanner Wrenches Repair Tool Applied to 4''5''6''7''9'' Angle Grinder Polisher (Blue)
features: Univesal grinder adjustable wrench is a set of power tool accessories that can help you quickly change and adjust the angle grinder and tighten the grinding wheel safely. The surface of adjustable spanner is made of high-quality electrophoretic paint, and the material made of high-quality carbon steel,durable and has a long service life. Adjustable lock angle grinder spanner is an indispensable tool for grinder.

Maximum adjustable distance of angle grinder adjustable wrench of the lock nut angle grinder is 8-48mm, and the adjustable angle design of angle grinder key spanner can adapt to a variety of angle grinders to the greatest extent. There is a hole at the bottom of the angle grinder spanner, which can be hung up, convenient for storage and not easy to lose.

The nut on the adjustable angle wrench can be tightened by hand or with a tool. But equipped with a small hex allen key allows you to tighten the screws more easily and conveniently. The firmness is increased on the basis of the hand-tightened screw, which makes disassembly and assembly flexible and convenient.

The ergonomic plastic coated handle part of angle grinder key is fully insulated, adopt environmental protection dipping handle, non-slip and comfortable. It can firmly hold and protect your hands from injury. Using the pin wrench can make your work easier and more convenient. The handle part is blue, the color is bright so that you can see it at first glance.

Adjustable pin wrenches are suitable for all angle grinders, bench grinders, circular saws and miter saws, grinding wheels or grinding wheels of marble machines. angle grinder key pin spanner is very suitable for dismantling angle grinders, marble machines, etc.
description: Product Details This is a universal adjustable angle grinder wrench,suitable for angle grinders of various specifications, with a hex key non-slip plastic coated handle, which is a good choice for angle grinder power tool accessories. grinder key using high-quality carbon steel materials, sturdy and durable, with a long service life, compact and easy to carry, rubber plastic handle, non-slip and comfortable, more firm grip.
